creator: portmaster@bsdforge.com
text:
(In reply to Jason Unovitch from comment #4)
> Created attachment 159795 [details]
> Revised patch to deal with r392447 fixes
> 
> The BROKEN master sites was fixed in 392447 a few weeks ago.
> https://svnweb.freebsd.org/ports?view=revision&revision=392447
> 
> So this version just adds BSDforge as one of the master sites and sets
> portmaster@BSDforge.com as the maintainer.

Initially, when I took this on, the (then) MASTER_SITES
was broken. I had the source, and use the port, so I
adopted it, and replaced the (then) broken MASTER_SITES
with my copy of the source. Since then, Mark chimed in,
and indicated he had fixed the the link. So I re-added
the original, leaving mine in place as backup.

So in short; yes. adds myself as MASTER_SITES, and
MAINTAINER. :)

--Chris
